text:
2025 IFI Fatherhood Essay Contest  
 
Student’s Name / Nombre del Estudiante Jayden Martinez 
Father/Father-Figure Name / Nombre del Padre/Figura Paterna  
March 19 
Grade / Grado 7th grade 
School / Escuela Rachel Carson Elementary  
Email Jamartinez124@cps.edu 
 Phone / Teléfono 3125934728  
"What my father or an important father-figure* means to me" "Lo que mi padre o una figura 
paterna importante* significa para mí 
I picked my brother Juan because they care for me and he is like a father figure because he 
makes sure we go home. He feeds us and I picked him instead of my dad because my dad's 
always at work because he travels. Also my brother he their for me every times I need him he's 
their when I cry and it helps because when I cry in front of my dad because of something bad 
he makes it wrote like when i feel he started laughing at me with my brother and when I have a 
wrinkle shirt he gets mad.It comes to a point that he barely my dad and my brother is because 
like I said he's their for me and tells me what to do and i listen because why would I listen to 
someone I barely met. Also when I see him every time it feels like i am free from school and all 
the stress and when me and my brother fight he's there all my dad does in nothing we just fight 
and fight until he tells us enough.  
I picked Mr Gaeta because he always helps other people and he's funny and he's a good father 
figure and he makes every life better and when something happens he talks to us and he does 
it to this kid robert he talks to him. Also he's just nice. He answers our questions and we get to 
talk a little in his class and he helps us with everything and his class is just the best. And he 
always understands us all the time and he is always there for other people. 
 
 
}
